testsuite.name: Options Record

testcase.name: should create erasure options via factory method

testsuite.system-out: 18:17:36.487 [nioEventLoopGroup-47-1] DEBUG io.netty.buffer.PoolThreadCache -- Freed 8 thread-local buffer(s) from thread: nioEventLoopGroup-47-1 18:17:36.487 [nioEventLoopGroup-45-1] DEBUG io.netty.buffer.PoolThreadCache -- Freed 9 thread-local buffer(s) from thread: nioEventLoopGroup-45-1
